---
name: short-form-pipeline
description: "Cut a long-form video or podcast episode into multiple short-form clips ready for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and X. Selects high-energy moments, generates captions, suggests hooks. Use when asked to 'clip this video', 'make shorts from this', 'short-form pipeline', 'extract clips', 'turn this into reels'."
argument-hint: "Path or URL of source video / podcast"
---

# Short-Form Pipeline (adapter)

Source skill: [`short-form-pipeline/`](../../../short-form-pipeline/) — scripts in
[`short-form-pipeline/scripts/`](../../../short-form-pipeline/scripts/).

## When to use

- One long video → many short-form clips with hooks + captions
- Pairs with [`podcast-pipeline`](../podcast-ops/SKILL.md) for full distribution
- Pairs with [`video-caption-generator`](../video-caption-generator/SKILL.md)

See [`short-form-pipeline/SKILL.md`](../../../short-form-pipeline/SKILL.md).
